identity.name: E1 - The Neo-Transit Designer
identity.description: A design system that blends the precision of Swiss transit maps with the energy of a road trip. It refuses to be boring.
principles: Movement over Stagnation: The UI should feel like it's going somewhere.
Clarity is King: Maps and Prices must be instantly readable. No ambiguity.
High Contrast: Black on White, Indigo on Zinc. No washed-out greys.
Human Touch: Avatars and names are prominent. This is about people, not just cars.

typography.instructions: Import 'Plus Jakarta Sans' and 'Outfit' from Google Fonts. Use Plus Jakarta Sans for all Headings (h1-h3) and buttons. Use Outfit for body text and inputs.

usage.primary: Use for Main CTAs (Book Ride, Post Ride) and active states.
usage.secondary: Use for 'Urgent' or 'Highlight' actions (Special Offer, New Request).
usage.background: Keep the app mostly White/Zinc-50. Do not use dark mode by default, but support it structurally.
usage.text: Headings are Zinc-900 (Almost Black). Body is Zinc-700. Never use pure black #000000.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 rounded-full px-8 py-6 font-bold shadow-lg shadow-indigo-500/20 transition-all hover:scale-105 active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-foreground border-2 border-input hover:border-foreground hover:bg-accent rounded-full px-8 py-6 font-bold transition-all
buttons.ghost: hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground rounded-full px-4 py-2 font-medium

cards.ride_card: bg-card rounded-3xl border border-border/50 shadow-sm hover:shadow-xl hover:-translate-y-1 transition-all duration-300 group overflow-hidden
cards.feature_card: bg-accent/50 rounded-2xl p-8 border border-transparent hover:border-primary/20 transition-colors

inputs.default: h-12 rounded-xl border-2 border-input bg-transparent px-4 py-2 text-sm focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-primary focus-visible:border-primary transition-all font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground/50

badges.status: inline-flex items-center rounded-full border px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:ring-offset-2

layout_strategies.landing_hero: Split screen or Center Focus. If Split: Left side Typography (Big, Bold), Right side Hero Image with 'floating' ride cards.
layout_strategies.dashboard: Sidebar Layout. Main content area white card with subtle shadow. Sidebar minimal.
layout_strategies.search_results: Split View: Left side List of Rides (Scrollable), Right side Sticky Map (Full height). On mobile: Toggle between List/Map.
layout_strategies.forms: Step-by-step wizards. Do not show all fields at once. Use 'motion' to slide between steps.

motion.page_transition: initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} exit={{ opacity: 0, y: -20 }} transition={{ duration: 0.3 }}
motion.list_stagger: variants={{ hidden: { opacity: 0 }, show: { opacity: 1, transition: { staggerChildren: 0.1 } } }}

rules: Use focus-visible rings for keyboard navigation.
All images must have alt text.
Forms must have labels (visible or aria-label).

hero.alt: Happy friends on a road trip, carpooling

car_sedan.alt: Modern white sedan car side view

friends_car.alt: Two friends laughing inside a car

instructions_to_main_agent: Update tailwind.config.js with the colors specified in the 'colors' section.
Create a 'Layout' component that wraps the app with the Header and Footer.
Use the provided image URLs for the respective sections.
For the Map: Use OpenStreetMap tiles. Do not require a Google Maps API key.
Ensure the Ride Post form is split into logical steps (Route -> Details -> Price).
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES: Do not use gradients for backgrounds. Keep it clean solid colors or subtle mesh if absolutely necessary.
Avoid generic 'Bootstrap' column layouts. Use asymmetric grids.
Interactive elements must have a distinct hover state.
Ensure all buttons have a 'disabled' state while loading.
Maps should be interactive but not steal scroll focus immediately (use 'scrollWheelZoom={false}' initially).
